3041800.name: Scramble Heart City
3041800.description:
Scramble Heart City is a 3v3 tag-team fighter that's beginner-friendly to pick up and play but features deep team and movement mechanics that reward practice and mastery.

✦ GAME FEATURES ✦

8 playable characters, all hand drawn and animated frame by frame.
Dripping in style, and ready to chain up to a super combo. 

  • Matchmake online for fast-paced fun

  • Practice in single player, honing your skills in a tutorial or combo trial

  • Try our comprehensive training mode with hitbox display and frame data measurements

Play anywhere with anyone across the world, with cross-play support for browser and Steam. Enjoy local multiplayer or online matchmaking with private lobbies, spectating, and smooth rollback netcode.

Also, that nasty combo you just landed? Yeah, we caught it on tape.
That's the power of automatic match replays with easy sharing.

Fighting games are all about community.
If you're looking for friends and fighting game fans, you just might find your home here. 

Sign up for our next playtest and play against the dev! 

✦ SUPPORT THE GAME ✦

This indie game is a passion project, developed by a competitor and fan of fighting games for 20+ years. Here's how you can help. 

  • Add Scramble Heart City to your Steam Wishlist

  • Join our Discord for the next playtest! 

  • Reach out if you want to talk about tournaments, events, or covering the game
